# terrible_community_general_seport (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `ports` (String) Ports or port ranges. Can be a list (since 2.6) or comma separated string.
- `proto` (String) Protocol for the specified port.
- `setype` (String) SELinux type for the specified port.

### Optional

- `ignore_selinux_state` (Boolean) Run independent of selinux runtime state.
- `local` (Boolean) Work with local modifications only.
- `reload` (Boolean) Reload SELinux policy after commit.
- `state` (String) Desired boolean value.
